title: Giardia Electrophysiological Assays
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2i6sh","text":"Methods for TransEpithelial Electrical Resistance (TEER) and short circuit current measurement of the effects of soluble mediator on intestinal epithelial cells. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"2ca6j","text":"Prepare Forskolin (10µM), UTP (100µM), Amiloride (10µM), DIDS (100µM) and GlyH-101 (50 µM) in aqueous solution and Amiloride (10mM), GlyH-101 (50mM) in DMSO.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
